V-M-074.scope: Responsive adaptation verification for phone, tablet, and desktop layouts across public, user, and admin routes.

success-scenarios.scenario-2: No document horizontal scroll, text overlap, clipped buttons, or hidden primary controls.
success-scenarios.scenario-3: Tablet layouts have intentional density, not stretched phone or cramped desktop behavior.

failure-scenarios.failure-1: Any viewport hides VPN config, MTProto, subscription, admin health, or emergency action paths.
failure-scenarios.failure-2: Reduced-motion or keyboard focus becomes inconsistent across breakpoints.
